title: Boat Rental Prague Vltava: Tips and Costs for 2026
html:
Renting a boat on the Vltava River in Prague offers a unique perspective on the city's landmarks, with departure points like Marina Holešovice and prices starting from around 50 EUR for a small motorboat. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators to ensure a smooth experience when you compare boat hire Prague Vltava options.

Where to set off in Prague Vltava

Start your voyage at one of several well-served marinas and docks along the Vltava. Marina Holešovice is a popular hub for boat hire, located near the city centre with easy access to the river. Yacht Club Praha offers a more exclusive setting, while the Rašín Embankment provides a convenient berth for smaller boats. The nearby town of Roztoky, a short cruise upstream, makes a pleasant stop, and the Slapy Reservoir, about 30 km south, extends your range for day trips. You can boat hire Prague Vltava for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat Ideal for couples or small families, the Axopar 22 has a maximum capacity of 7 guests and is available from 150 EUR per half-day.
  2. Sailing yacht A 30-foot vessel such as the Dufour 31 offers a peaceful cruise for up to 6 guests, from 250 EUR per day.
  3. Catamaran The Lagoon 38 provides stable sailing with ample deck space for groups of up to 10 guests, from 400 EUR for a full day charter.
  4. Luxury motor yacht For an upscale experience, charter a Prestige 500 with capacity for 12 guests, from 1200 EUR per day. See the Prestige 500 listing on BoatHire24 for full specifications.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Prague Vltava?

Prices vary from about 50 EUR for a shared tour to over 1200 EUR for a luxury yacht per day. A small motorboat for a half-day starts around 150 EUR, while a full-day catamaran charter can cost 450 EUR to 700 EUR. For a crewed yacht, expect prices from 800 EUR to 1500 EUR depending on size and amenities. The following list shows typical price bands:

  • Shared sightseeing tour: 50, 80 EUR per person
  • Small motorboat (half-day): 150, 250 EUR
  • Catamaran (full-day): 450, 700 EUR for up to 10 guests
  • Luxury crewed yacht (full-day): 800, 1500 EUR

When is the best season to rent a boat in Prague Vltava?

The high season runs from May to September, with peak crowds in July and August. The prevailing winds in summer are light south-westerlies, which are ideal for gentle sailing. A local tip: charter in June or September to avoid the busiest periods and still enjoy warm weather. One option worth a look is the Prestige 500 listing.

Book a boat for a late afternoon departure to see the city illuminated at sunset, a favourite among local skippers.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Prague Vltava?

Inland waterways in the Czech Republic generally require a licence for self-drive boats over a certain power threshold. Most rental operators include a qualified skipper or offer a short briefing for small boats. Always confirm your specific licence requirements with the operator when booking; they will advise whether an International Certificate of Competence (ICC) is needed.

At a glance

  • Price range: 50, 1500 EUR per trip
  • Peak months: May to September
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full day (8 hours)
  • Maximum guest capacity: 12 for luxury yachts
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Prague Vltava

Can I rent a boat in Prague without a licence?

Yes, many operators rent small motorboats with a brief safety induction, though larger vessels require a skipper or licence.

What is the best route for a day trip on the Vltava?

A popular route heads south from Prague towards the Slapy Reservoir, offering scenic countryside and calm waters about 15 nautical miles away.

Are there boat rentals available in winter?

Most boat rentals cease from October to March, but some operators offer limited winter tours on heated vessels by advance arrangement.

Whether you are organising a family outing or a corporate event, booking through BoatHire24 ensures a reliable experience. Boat owners can also list their boats on the platform to reach a global audience. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Prague Vltava or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Prague Vltava and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
